utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay , I have to tell you something that I have never admitted during our entire friendship !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: But , when we were in high school I made out with James Farrell even when I knew that you liked him !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Wow , that feels so good to get off my chest !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: My turn ? What ... what are you talking about ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ugh , Monica , I know about you and Chandler .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I overheard you guys on the phone the other day , and you said , " I will just tell Rachel that I am doing laundry for a couple of hours . "

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well . Sounds like you are writing yourself a little play there Rach . Wow ! Let me know how that one turns out .

emotion_cause.span: 11_Sounds like you are writing yourself a little play there Rach . Wow ! Let me know how that one turns out .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well , I would not know because I got so freaked out that I hung up the phone .

emotion_cause.span: 12_I would not know because I got so freaked out that I hung up the phone .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well , if you had kept listening , you ... you would have heard me call him Mr . Big ... ot .

emotion_cause.span: 13_if you had kept listening , you ... you would have heard me call him Mr . Big ... ot .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Mr . Bigot . He tells the most racist jokes .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: All right . So you are telling me that there is nothing going on between you and Chandler .

emotion_cause.span: 16_So you are telling me that there is nothing going on between you and Chandler .
16_you are telling me that there is nothing going on between you and Chandler .
